fact: Bun chosen over Node.js for runtime — monorepo with workspaces
recommendation: Use Bun APIs and bun.lock, not npm/yarn

fact: Hono chosen as HTTP framework for lightweight, edge-compatible backend
recommendation: Follow Hono patterns for new routes, avoid Express-style middleware

fact: Zustand for state management — all state keyed by session ID
recommendation: New state slices must be session-scoped, never global singletons
